title: The Brave New World
description: A medium sized adventure pack that focuses on exploration, combat, and QoL changes.
body: ![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9098a0456e450b0a191097d16942e9303505824.png) ## The Breakdown The goal of this pack is to overhaul the world with hundreds of exploration and adventure opportunities while still maintaining the sandbox gameplay of Minecraft. No quests or storyline other than what the mod's provide, do what you want at your own pace! This is a modern remake of the [original](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/the-brave-new-world)! ## Noteable Mods - Alex's Caves - Alex's Mobs - Better Combat - ChoiceTheorem's Overhauled Village - Create - Deeper and Darker - Distant Horizons - Dungeon Now Loading - Exposure - Farmer's Delight - FastMove - Parkour Movement - Ice and Fire - Immersive Aircraft - Integrated Dungeons and Structures - Integrated Stronghold - Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks - L_Ender's Cataclysm - Nullscape - Pufferfish's Skills - Rats - Region's Unexplored - Simply Swords - Theuology - Waystones - When Dungeons Arise ## Links
